name: Beef Jambalaya 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef into 1/2-inch cubes and toss with thyme.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a skillet. Stir in green pepper, green onion, celery, and mushrooms. Cook until tender; remove from pan.
4. Add remaining tablespoon oil to pan. Stir in beef. Cook until browned.
5. Stir in water, wine (sherry), beef bouillon cubes, and Worcestershire sauce. Simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
6. Stir in rice and cook for 25 minutes longer, or until rice is tender.
7. Stir in precooked vegetables, stirring constantly until heated through.
